---
output: pdf_document

---

# Test\label{label1}

```{python echo=TRUE}

a = 2
b = 3
c = a + b
print(c)

```


```{r echo=TRUE}

library(reticulate)

# Import and run a Python file
py_run_file("Skrypty/test_skryptu.py")

```


```{python echo=TRUE}

from semanticscholar import SemanticScholar
sch = SemanticScholar()
paper = sch.get_paper('10.1016/j.jafr.2024.101013')
paper.title

```
